@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+// swift-tools-version: 6.2
+
+import PackageDescription
+
+let package = Package(
+    name: "ElevenLabsKitCLI",
+    platforms: [
+        .macOS(.v15)
+    ],
+    dependencies: [
+        .package(path: "../..")
+    ],
+    targets: [
+        .executableTarget(
+            name: "ElevenLabsKitCLI",
+            dependencies: [
+                .product(name: "ElevenLabsKit", package: "ElevenLabsKit")
+            ]
+        )
+    ]
+)
